# BI-260008: Establish comprehensive testing foundation

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260008
- Title: Establish comprehensive testing foundation for public site
- Status: Done
- Persona/Actor: Development team maintaining and extending the public site
- Value statement: For the development team, deliver a complete testing infrastructure (unit, component, E2E, and static analysis) to achieve confidence in changes, prevent regressions, and maintain code quality.
- Context: Three backlog items have been implemented (BI-260001, BI-260002, BI-260003) with minimal testing infrastructure. Before continuing with remaining features, establish a robust testing foundation aligned with crystord_web project and backfill automated verification for those completed items.
- Problem statement: Current setup has basic Vitest but lacks E2E testing (Playwright), enhanced component testing capabilities, and static analysis (ESLint), creating risk of regressions and inconsistent code quality.
- Expected outcome: Complete testing infrastructure matches crystord_web approach, enabling confident development and automated quality gates.
- Success metric(s): All test types (unit, component, E2E) can be executed; ESLint enforces code standards; CI-ready configuration exists.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Playwright installed and configured with E2E test directory structure
  - Playwright config targets Astro dev server with appropriate browser matrix
  - Enhanced Vitest configuration for component/integration testing
  - ESLint installed with Astro and TypeScript support
  - Test scripts defined in package.json (test, test:watch, test:e2e)
  - E2E tests cover at least one critical flow from BI-260003 (navigation structure and routing behavior)
  - Unit/component tests cover representative behavior from BI-260001 and BI-260002 where feasible
  - Existing BI-260001, BI-260002, and BI-260003 behavior is verified by automated tests before BI-260008 is marked Done
  - Documentation added explaining testing approach and how to run tests
  - All tests pass in CI-like environment
- Non-goals: Achieving 100% code coverage or rewriting existing functionality; focus is on infrastructure.
- Constraints: Must work with static-site Astro build; no server-side runtime dependencies.
- Dependencies: None
- Risks/assumptions: Astro component testing may require specific configuration; assume Playwright's webServer integration handles dev server lifecycle.
- Validation approach: Run test suite successfully; verify ESLint catches common issues; execute E2E test against running site; map added tests to BI-260001, BI-260002, and BI-260003 acceptance behavior.
- Priority score: High (must complete before BI-260004 through BI-260007)
- Target window: Immediate - quality gate for remaining backlog items
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260008.md
  - ADR: ADR-260008.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
